reasons.title: Industry-Aligned Curriculum
reasons.description: Built around the tools, workflows, and expectations of real data teams — not textbooks.

reasons.title: Real-World Projects
reasons.description: Every programme includes hands-on projects drawn from genuine consulting engagements.

reasons.title: Mentorship & Career Guidance
reasons.description: One-to-one support from experienced data professionals throughout your learning journey.

reasons.title: Consulting-Led Training Approach
reasons.description: Our instructors are active consultants — you learn what's practised, not just what's taught.

reasons.title: UK-Based Standards
reasons.description: Curricula aligned with UK industry standards, employer expectations, and GDPR compliance.
